claim: Multimodal embeddings put text, images, and videos in the same vector space, enabling semantic similarity matching across modalities
actionable: Use multimodal embedding models (Qwen3-VL) to embed documents as images rather than OCR-only to preserve visual structure in RAG
source_title: Qwen3 Multimodal Embeddings: Finally, RAG That Sees

claim: Embedding models provide high recall (~85% precision) but require reranker models for fine-grain scoring to achieve high precision
actionable: Use embedding models to retrieve top-K candidates, then apply a reranker to select the best match for high-precision results
source_title: Qwen3 Multimodal Embeddings: Finally, RAG That Sees

claim: Matryoshka representation learning allows using smaller embedding dimensions (64D-1024D instead of full 4096D) for faster retrieval with minimal accuracy loss
actionable: Test lower embedding dimensions (512D, 1024D) for your use case to speed up search without substantial performance drop
source_title: Qwen3 Multimodal Embeddings: Finally, RAG That Sees

claim: Qwen3-VL-8B ranks #1 on MMEB leaderboard; 2B model ranks #5 and outperforms many 7B models despite being 3.5x smaller
actionable: Consider smaller models (2B) for cost-sensitive multimodal RAG if embedding quality metrics are acceptable for your domain
source_title: Qwen3 Multimodal Embeddings: Finally, RAG That Sees

claim: Multimodal embeddings enable use cases like visual document search, e-commerce image search, and video frame indexing
actionable: For PDFs/documents with mixed text and images, embed entire pages as images instead of text-only extraction
source_title: Qwen3 Multimodal Embeddings: Finally, RAG That Sees
